geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts, with special consideration for organizations serving Worcester, Massachusetts and its surrounding communities
project_area: Educational, human services, and health care programming for underserved populations, including adult education, family services, health, youth development, and more
demographic_requirements: Priority consideration for projects serving children and youth, economically disadvantaged people, and low-income people
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations with 501(c)(3) status serving Massachusetts residents, with preference given to those serving Worcester and surrounding areas.
